docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-19-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VALENCIA DENTAL CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF EDER BANOS MEDINA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VALENCIA DENTAL CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ABHILASHA BAL, DDS, PRATICE OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ABHILASHA BAL, PRACTICE OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT VALENCIA DENTAL CENTER
